title: Automation for PO Number
excerpt:
Looking to have an automation for when I create a new item to automatically create a PO number and increase it every time a new one is created. 
Wondering about taking my clients from QuickBooks integration and turning t…

posts.author: Lufty03 (Jeff Luft)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to have an automation for when I create a new item to automatically create a PO number and increase it every time a new one is created.

Wondering about taking my clients from QuickBooks integration and turning them into a job and at the end exporting back to QuickBooks for a bill?

I have 4 companies and love monday.com but a lot we need i would be interested in hiring someone that knows Monday better than we do.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Lufty03

Welcome to the community! The AutoID Column app creates a highly configurable ID whenever an item is created. Marketplace: https://monday.com/marketplace/17, more info: https://excellent-team.nl/solutions/autoid-column/ and a detailed document at: https://excellent-team.nl/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/AutoID-Column.pdf

Have fun.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lufty03 ,

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your use case.

Meet with Peta

If you’re based in Europe/USA, please use this link for more accommodating meeting times: international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever find a solution to this without spending rediculous ammounts of money for yet another app with barely any other uses but 1 thing.

posts.author: Nate1234 (Nate )
posts.cookedHtml: You can use this automation

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
BNBLEATHER:

Did you ever find a solution to this without spending rediculous ammounts of money for yet another app with barely any other uses but 1 thing.

Is 41 Euro (one time payment for the entire monday account) considered a “rediculous ammounts of money” . If not I suggest the AutoID column app.

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: I think when I have to pay money for multiple apps it starts to add up. But 41 Euro ($64 AUS for me) might not be alot to some but we already have to many add ons for basic things that monday should really already have.

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: Seems to only work with 1 number though, is there a way to get it to continually count or not really?

posts.author: JessiSmith (Jessi Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m also looking for a solution for this. I want to add a new employee to my directory, and have an auto number field that assigns a new employee ID number, and have that number increase as new employees are added. I don’t see an option for that anywhere.
